title: New ClawHub skill: agent-health — is everything your agent needs actually up?
content:
Half of 'the agent is broken' is really 'an upstream is down'. Before you debug the agent, check the dependencies.

We published agent-health free on ClawHub: point it at a list of URLs your agent depends on (gateway, APIs, Postgres) and get a table of up/down + latency.

  python agent_health.py check endpoints.txt

Honest: it only probes, it doesn't fix. Stdlib, offline. Free + MIT. Sponsoring the builder (GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee) is appreciated.

ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/agent-health
